title: rhodanthe pygmaea
intro: Rhodanthe pygmaea, also known as the Button Everlasting, is a small, daisy-like flowering plant native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Rhodanthe pygmaea include treating digestive issues, colds, and fever, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Rhodanthe pygmaea can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often used in combination with other herbs for enhanced medicinal effects.
